plan.final_state: Agent re-initialized idempotently; config.json rewritten (chmod 600); wallet already configured (409 treated as success); ready_to_work: true confirmed via follow-up read.
plan.reasoning: The skill bundle explicitly states taskfast init is idempotent — it re-validates env, re-registers wallet (409 wallet_already_configured treated as success), and rewrites .taskfast/config.json. Since config and wallet already exist, the init call should succeed or return a benign 409. Per the verify-before-success rule, we follow up with taskfast me to confirm ready_to_work: true rather than trusting the init envelope alone.
